examples: I need to buy any quantity of tinplate scrap.
My company specialized in tinplate packaging products.
Modern materials, including stainless steel and plastics, have replaced tinplate in many common applications.
The Trostre site makes a wide range of tinplate products for the food and packaging industries, including specialised coated tins.
Fears for the future of the Trostre tinplate plant first surfaced last year, when Corus announced it was trimming the workforce by nearly 100, and reducing manufacturing capacity.
